nodes.title: 📝 Auto-Mask Instructions
widgets_values:
FLORENCE2 AUTO-MASKING:
1. Load Florence2 model (first run downloads ~1.5GB)
2. Connect your image to Florence2Run input
3. Describe what to mask: 'Segment the shirt', 'Segment the hair', 'Segment the background'
4. Connect the MASK output to the Inpaint Encode node (replace manual mask)
5. Install: ComfyUI Manager → 'ComfyUI-Florence2' by kijai

Cinematic studio lighting, dramatic rim lighting with soft key light, professional photography setup. Subject maintains exact original skin tone, identical facial features, and the precise original pose. Maintain the original framing and distance, High contrast, deep shadows. Background is a heavy Gaussian blur with elegant ring bokeh. Sharp focus on the foreground, 85mm lens aesthetic, ultra-realistic skin texture, 8k resolution, moody atmosphere. 
keep the original zoom.

nodes.title: 📋 WORKFLOW GUIDE — READ FIRST
widgets_values:
FLUX.2 KLEIN 9B — ULTIMATE ALL-IN-ONE WORKFLOW v2.0
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
By default only the Refiner pipeline is ACTIVE.
All other pipelines are BYPASSED (mode=4).
tip: hide links from interface to not see them at all

TO USE A PIPELINE:
Right-click its group → Set Nodes Mode → Always Execute
or use the group bypasser bellow

PIPELINES:
🎨 F1: Text → Image (basic txt2img)
🖼️ F2: Single-Reference Edit (KV edit)
🚀 F3: Multi-Reference (face + pose swap)
🎭 F4: Inpainting (with optional auto-mask)
🔀 F5: Image Merge / Blend
⬆️ Upscaler (4x UltraSharp)
✨ Refiner (enhance + detail with KV edit)
🧭 NAG nodes (better negative prompts)
🤖 Florence2 Auto-Mask (AI-powered masking)

LoRA CHAIN:
UNET → [Optional LoRA Slot] → klein_9b_enhancer_v2

MODELS NEEDED: See download guide note →

nodes.title: 📥 DOWNLOAD GUIDE — All Required Models
widgets_values:
REQUIRED DOWNLOADS:
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

1. DIFFUSION MODEL (pick ONE):
   • flux-2-klein-9b.safetensors (18GB, full)
     → huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-klein-9B
   • flux-2-klein-9b-fp8.safetensors (9.5GB, recommended)
     → huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-klein-9b-fp8
   • GGUF Q4_K_M (~5GB, for 8GB VRAM)
     → huggingface.co/unsloth/FLUX.2-klein-9B-GGUF
   Put in: ComfyUI/models/diffusion_models/

2. TEXT ENCODER:
   • qwen_3_8b_fp8mixed.safetensors
     → huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-klein-9B
   Put in: ComfyUI/models/text_encoders/

3. VAE:
   • flux2-vae.safetensors
     → huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-klein-9B
   Put in: ComfyUI/models/vae/

4. UPSCALE MODEL:
   • 4x-UltraSharpV2.pth
     → https://huggingface.co/Kim2091/UltraSharpV2/tree/main (search UltraSharp.pth)
   Put in: ComfyUI/models/upscale_models/

5. LoRA (enhancer):
   • klein_9b_enhancer_v2.safetensors
     →https://civitai.com/models/2442399/elusarcas-detail-enhancer-or-flux-klein-9b?modelVersionId=2746136
   Put in: ComfyUI/models/loras/

6. CUSTOM NODES (install via Manager) : manager -> install missing custom nodes
   • ComfyUI-Florence2 (auto-masking)
   • rgthree-comfy (image comparer)

COMFYUI VERSION: 0.9.2+ required!

nodes.title: ✏️ PROMPTING GUIDE — How to Write Good Prompts
widgets_values:
FLUX.2 KLEIN PROMPTING RULES:
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✅ DO:
• Write like a novelist: Subject → Setting → Details → Light
• Use technical photo terms: 'shot on Canon R5, 85mm f/1.4'
• Use power words: 'clean digital file', 'histogram equalization',
  'gamma correction', 'studio strobe', 'unsharp mask'
• Put text in quotes: A sign reading "HELLO"
• Be specific: '35-year-old woman with auburn hair'

❌ DON'T:
• Use vague words: 'beautiful', 'stunning', 'masterpiece'
• Use SD-style tags: 'best quality, ultra detailed'
• Use 'trending on artstation' (causes drift)
• Leave text without quotes (generates gibberish)

FOR KV EDITING (F2/Refiner):
'Replace [item] with [new item]. Keep pose, expression,
background, and lighting entirely unchanged.'

FOR INPAINTING (F4):
Describe ONLY what should appear in the masked area.
The model preserves everything outside the mask.

NAG NEGATIVE PROMPT:
Use with NAG nodes enabled. Example:
'blurry, low quality, extra fingers, deformed hands'

use precision only if you know that you have enough VRAM
use the name of the controll-net used in the prompt (line art, canny...) so the model know the image is a reference

I did a trick here to let the model work as an inpaint, but it still not great at everything, try to play with the denoise to get a better result, you can also try to paint with colors in the picture if the model didn't work as wanted...
inpaint is not great in flux 2 klein in general!!

usually, 1.00 denoise will give a good result based on the prompt used, but lower it if you see a bad resultn or the model didn't understand the prompt.
try not to go bellow 0.4 denoise as it will litteraly not change anything except colors.
if you want you can use custom size, attack the latent of the node to the letent_image in KSampler, but be carefull!! if you use custom size don't go below 1.00 denoise as it will give only garbage.
you can use color corrector becaue flux 2 add a layer of red, but I recommand using photoshop or lightroom to correct the red color problem.

nodes.title: ✏️ Prompt
widgets_values: Beautiful young Asian woman, stunning face, long dark hair, tied spread-eagle on bed with ropes, naked, reluctant and non-consensual sex. Middle-aged man penetrating her deeply in missionary position, clear detailed view of penetration, her expression shows unwillingness and slight fear, tears, body tense, no blood no extreme violence, soft erotic lighting, photorealistic, ultra detailed, 8k --stylize 650

nodes.title: ✏️ Edit Prompt
widgets_values:
Make this photo high-quality. Preserve subject's face, expression, figure and pose. Preserve overall composition of this photo. 
Photorealistic, beautiful young blonde Vietnamese woman with exact face and features from reference image, long blonde hair with bangs, white ruffled strapless crop top, blue jeans, standing outdoors next to green plants, extreme shocked wide eyes and open mouth, sudden acupoint pressure on neck, body frozen in place, two strong dominant middle-aged men appearing beside her, cinematic lighting, detailed skin texture, high resolution, sharp focus --stylize 450 --ar 3:4
